scripts.ci:check: pnpm format:check && pnpm lint && pnpm typecheck && pnpm test && pnpm build
scripts.dev: pnpm run build:packages && pnpm --parallel --stream --filter @repurposepro/web --filter @repurposepro/api --filter @repurposepro/worker run dev
scripts.dev:api: pnpm run build:packages && pnpm --filter @repurposepro/api run dev
scripts.dev:web: pnpm run build:packages && pnpm --filter @repurposepro/web run dev
scripts.dev:worker: pnpm run build:packages && pnpm --filter @repurposepro/worker run dev
scripts.typecheck: pnpm run build:packages && pnpm --filter @repurposepro/db exec tsc -p tsconfig.scripts.json --noEmit && pnpm --filter @repurposepro/db exec tsc -p tsconfig.config.json --noEmit && pnpm --filter @repurposepro/web --filter @repurposepro/api --filter @repurposepro/worker -r run typecheck
